use_when: The Lab must support complex decisions by falsifying options and exposing constraints.
The value is reducing bad action space under uncertainty.
do_not_use_when: The decision has no observable feedback loop.
Stakeholders, constraints or failure costs cannot be made explicit.

starter_observables.name: constraint_violation
starter_observables.role: Boundary a decision must not cross.
starter_observables.risk: Unweighted constraints can hide fatal blockers.

starter_observables.name: feedback_latency
starter_observables.role: Delay before outcome can be observed.
starter_observables.risk: Slow feedback can make early success illusory.

starter_falsifiers.blocks: Optimizing for one actor while externalizing cost.
Mistaking a KPI improvement for system improvement.

admin_boundaries.boundary: Run current decision frame against constraints and baselines.
The Lab can constrain or recommend review, not approve execution.

e2e_checks.expectation: A completed cycle updates forbidden actions and unresolved decision tensions.

adaptation_questions: What action space is actually controllable?
Which failure is unacceptable even if metrics improve?
What feedback can verify or falsify the decision?
